# IQ-TREE internal labels look like "SHaLRT/UFboot" e.g. "98.5/100"
def parse_support(conf):
    if conf is None: return None,None
    s = str(conf)
    if "/" in s:
        a,b = s.split("/")[:2]
        try: return float(a), float(b)
        except: return None,None
    return None,None

n_tips = btree.count_terminals()
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(13, 13))

def label_func(clade):
    return ""  # we draw custom labels

# draw
Phylo.draw(btree, axes=ax, do_show=False, label_func=lambda c: "", 
           show_confidence=False)

# Now overlay colored tip labels and support on internal nodes
# Build positions the same way Bio.Phylo does
# Recompute x (depth) and y positions
depths = btree.depths()
# y positions: assign terminals 1..n top to bottom as drawn
terms = btree.get_terminals()
ypos = {}
for i,t in enumerate(terms):
    ypos[t] = i+1
def get_y(clade):
    if clade.is_terminal(): return ypos[clade]
    return (get_y(clade.clades[0]) + get_y(clade.clades[-1]))/2.0

# Bio.Phylo draws with y inverted (1 at top). Clear and redraw manually for control
ax.clear()
xmax = max(depths.values())
# draw branches
def draw_clade(clade, x_start):
    x_here = depths[clade]
    y_here = get_y(clade)
    # vertical connector across children
    if not clade.is_terminal():
        ys = [get_y(c) for c in clade.clades]
        ax.plot([x_here,x_here],[min(ys),max(ys)], color="k", lw=0.8)
        for c in clade.clades:
            ax.plot([x_here, depths[c]],[get_y(c),get_y(c)], color="k", lw=0.8)
            draw_clade(c, x_here)
draw_clade(btree.root, 0)

for t in terms:
    lab = t.name
    m = meta.get(lab,{})
    dom = m.get("domain","?")
    org = m.get("organism","").split("(")[0].strip()
    life = m.get("lifestyle","")
    txt = f'  {m.get("accession","")} {org}'
    if life: txt += f'  [{life}]'
    fw = "bold" if "Methanocaldococcus" in lab else "normal"
    ax.text(depths[t], get_y(t), txt, va="center", ha="left",
            fontsize=7.2, color=dom_color.get(dom,"k"), fontweight=fw)

# internal support: UFboot
for cl in btree.get_nonterminals():
    sh,uf = parse_support(cl.confidence if cl.confidence is not None else cl.name)
    if uf is not None and uf>=70:
        ax.plot(depths[cl], get_y(cl), 'o', ms=3.2,
                color=("black" if uf>=95 else "#888"))

ax.set_xlim(-0.02*xmax, xmax*1.55)
ax.set_ylim(n_tips+1, 0)
ax.set_xlabel("substitutions per site", fontsize=10)
ax.set_yticks([]); 
for s in ["top","right","left"]: ax.spines[s].set_visible(False)
ax.set_title("Maximum-likelihood phylogeny of the NIF3/DUF34 family across all three domains of life\n"
             "IQ-TREE, LG+I+G4, midpoint-rooted. Filled circles = UFboot ≥70 (black ≥95, grey 70–95).\n"
             "Focal extremophile: MJ0927 / Q58337 (Methanocaldococcus jannaschii, bold)", fontsize=10.5)
legend = [Patch(facecolor=dom_color[d], label=d) for d in ["Archaea","Bacteria","Eukarya"]]
# scale bar
ax.plot([0,0.5],[n_tips+0.3,n_tips+0.3], 'k-', lw=1.5)
ax.text(0.25, n_tips+0.7, "0.5", ha="center", fontsize=8)
ax.legend(handles=legend, loc="lower right", fontsize=10, framealpha=0.95)
fig.tight_layout()
fig.savefig("nif3_tree.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
print("saved nif3_tree.png;", n_tips, "tips; xmax depth", round(xmax,2))

import csv
from collections import Counter, defaultdict
from Bio import SeqIO, AlignIO
import logomaker
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Load metadata
meta = {row["label"]: row for row in csv.DictReader(open("{{artifact:508bbade-0554-4d1b-a39f-73c722af78c6}}"))}

# Load raw sequences
raw = {r.id: str(r.seq) for r in SeqIO.parse("{{artifact:a13f490f-ea18-4566-bfc9-08365e170b1e}}", "fasta")}

# Find labels for the two anchors
ecoli = [l for l in raw if l.startswith("P0AFP6")][0]
mj    = [l for l in raw if l.startswith("Q58337")][0]

ec_sites = [63, 64, 101, 215, 219]  # 1-based UniProt positions

# Load alignment
aln = AlignIO.read("{{artifact:ee1e81d4-9f88-41db-9354-cc7bd0f13393}}", "fasta")
aln_d = {rec.id: str(rec.seq) for rec in aln}

def ungapped_to_col(label, pos1):
    s = aln_d[label]; c = 0
    for i, ch in enumerate(s):
        if ch != "-":
            c += 1
            if c == pos1:
                return i
    return None

site_cols = [ungapped_to_col(ecoli, p) for p in ec_sites]

# Build rows of (label, domain, organism, states)
rows = []
for rec in aln:
    lab = rec.id
    s = str(rec.seq)
    states = [s[c] for c in site_cols]
    rows.append((lab, meta[lab]["domain"], meta[lab]["organism"], states))

# Build per-domain frequency matrices for the 5 site columns
domains = ["Archaea", "Bacteria", "Eukarya"]
site_labels = ["H63", "H64", "D101", "H215", "E219"]
aa = "ACDEFGHIKLMNPQRSTVWY"

def freq_df(dom):
    seqs = [st for lab, d, org, st in rows if d == dom]
    M = np.zeros((5, len(aa)))
    for st in seqs:
        for i, ch in enumerate(st):
            if ch in aa:
                M[i, aa.index(ch)] += 1
    M = M / M.sum(1, keepdims=True)
    return pd.DataFrame(M, columns=list(aa), index=range(5))  # integer index

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(8, 7), sharex=True)
for ax, dom in zip(axes, domains):
    df = freq_df(dom)
    logomaker.Logo(df, ax=ax, color_scheme='chemistry')
    n = sum(1 for r in rows if r[1] == dom)
    ax.set_title(f'{dom}  (n={n})', fontsize=11, loc="left")
    ax.set_ylabel("frequency"); ax.set_ylim(0, 1.05)
    ax.set_xticks(range(5)); ax.set_xticklabels(site_labels)
axes[-1].set_xlabel("Dinuclear metal-binding site position (E. coli YbgI numbering)")
fig.suptitle("NIF3/DUF34 dinuclear metal-site residues by domain of life\n"
             "Reference motif H-H-D-H-E. Note His63→Tyr substitution unique to Eukarya.", fontsize=11)
fig.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.95])
fig.savefig("metal_site_logo.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
print("saved metal_site_logo.png")
print("Eukaryote H63-col residues:", [(meta[l]['accession'], st[0]) for l, d, o, st in rows if d == 'Eukarya'])
print("Bacterial non-His at H63:", [(meta[l]['accession'], meta[l]['organism'][:20], st[0]) for l, d, o, st in rows if d == 'Bacteria' and st[0] != 'H'])

import csv

matplotlib.use("Agg")

from Bio import AlignIO, SeqIO

# Load metadata
meta = {row["label"]:row for row in csv.DictReader(open("{{artifact:508bbade-0554-4d1b-a39f-73c722af78c6}}"))}

# Load raw sequences
raw = {r.id: str(r.seq) for r in SeqIO.parse("{{artifact:ee1e81d4-9f88-41db-9354-cc7bd0f13393}}", "fasta")}

# Load alignment
aln = AlignIO.read("{{artifact:ee1e81d4-9f88-41db-9354-cc7bd0f13393}}", "fasta")
aln_d = {rec.id: str(rec.seq) for rec in aln}

# Find labels for E. coli and MJ
ecoli = [l for l in raw if l.startswith("P0AFP6")][0]
mj    = [l for l in raw if l.startswith("Q58337")][0]

ec_sites = [63, 64, 101, 215, 219]
mj_sites = [65, 66, 102, 216, 220]

def ungapped_to_col(label, pos1):
    s = aln_d[label]; c = 0
    for i, ch in enumerate(s):
        if ch != "-":
            c += 1
            if c == pos1: return i
    return None

site_cols = [ungapped_to_col(ecoli, p) for p in ec_sites]

# Build rows
rows = []
for rec in aln:
    lab = rec.id
    s = str(rec.seq)
    states = [s[c] for c in site_cols]
    rows.append((lab, meta[lab]["domain"], meta[lab]["organism"], states))

# Generate heatmap
site_labels = ["H63\nMetal-1", "H64\nMetal-1", "D101\nbridge", "H215\nMetal-2", "E219\nMetal-2"]
ref = ["H", "H", "D", "H", "E"]

ordered = sorted(rows, key=lambda x: (x[1], x[2]))
dom_color = {"Archaea": "#d62728", "Bacteria": "#1f77b4", "Eukarya": "#2ca02c"}
N = len(ordered)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6.5, 12))
for r, (lab, dom, org, st) in enumerate(ordered):
    for c, ch in enumerate(st):
        match = (ch == ref[c])
        face = "#e8f5e9" if match else "#ffebee"
        ax.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((c, N-1-r), 1, 1, facecolor=face, edgecolor="white", lw=0.5))
        ax.text(c+0.5, N-1-r+0.5, ch, ha="center", va="center", fontsize=8,
                color=("#1b5e20" if match else "#b71c1c"),
                fontweight=("normal" if match else "bold"))

for r, (lab, dom, org, st) in enumerate(ordered):
    short = f'{meta[lab]["accession"]} {org.split("(")[0].strip()[:26]}'
    fw = "bold" if "Methanocaldococcus" in lab else "normal"
    ax.text(-0.2, N-1-r+0.5, short, ha="right", va="center", fontsize=6.5,
            color=dom_color[dom], fontweight=fw)

ax.set_xlim(-0.2, 5); ax.set_ylim(0, N)
ax.set_xticks([c+0.5 for c in range(5)]); ax.set_xticklabels(site_labels, fontsize=8)
ax.xaxis.tick_top()
ax.set_yticks([])
for s in ax.spines.values(): s.set_visible(False)
ax.set_title("Dinuclear metal-site residues per sequence (ref H-H-D-H-E)\n"
             "green=matches ancestral/reference, red=substituted", fontsize=10, pad=30)
handles = [mpatches.Patch(color=dom_color[d], label=d) for d in dom_color]
ax.legend(handles=handles, loc="lower left", bbox_to_anchor=(0, -0.03), fontsize=8, ncol=3)
fig.tight_layout()
